title: lathyrus laetiflorus subsp. alefeldii
intro: Lathyrus laetiflorus subsp. alefeldii, also known as the American or wild sweet pea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular and digestive health. The health benefits of Lathyrus laetiflorus subsp. alefeldii include reducing inflammation, improving blood circulation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
